import "./AddRecipe.css"; import UserNavbar from "./UserNavbar"; export default function AddRecipe() { const handleSubmit = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); // Collect form data (UI only for now) const form = e.target; const recipeData = { title: form.title.value, ingredients: form.ingredients.value, steps: form.steps.value, time: form.time.value, difficulty: form.difficulty.value, image: form.image.files[0], }; console.log("Recipe Data:", recipeData); alert("Recipe submitted successfully (UI only)"); }; return (
